summary: Published dunning-ladder skill to runx registry under umbtest03, opened PR #139 from umbtest03/runx, harness updated with cap-reached escalation case (exit 1), sealed + failure cases both pass, post-publish dogfood run sealed receipt captured.
observations: Publish method: runx registry publish skills/dunning-ladder --profile X.yaml --registry https://api.runx.ai
Install command: runx add umbtest03/dunning-ladder@sha-7a9d3f3dcabe --registry https://api.runx.ai
Case 1: within-cap-reminder — sealed. Input: invoice_status=overdue, aging_days=15, cap=3, step=1. Output: reminder_proposal.channel=email. Chosen step is within cap, reminder sent.

Case 2: cap-reached-escalate — failure. Input: invoice_status=overdue, aging_days=60, cap=3, step=3. Output: escalation.reason=cadence cap reached. Cap exhausted, skill exits code 1 with escalation on stderr.
Cap: 3 steps. Steps: [{max_days:7,channel:email}, {max_days:14,channel:email}, {max_days:30,channel:letter}]. Aging 60 days resolves to step 3 (>= cap), triggering escalation.
step(3) >= cap(3) → decision.action=escalate, reminder_proposal=null, escalation.reason=cadence cap reached, escalation.recommended_action=escalate to collections. Skill exits code 1.
Receipt IDs: sha256:57b2012f560d6564837fc1d6bbf60d58920942766dc026aee52c130dbfddd630 (sealed), cap-reached-escalate (failure, no receipt generated)
Command: runx skill umbtest03/dunning-ladder@sha-7a9d3f3dcabe --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i invoice_status=overdue -i aging_days=15 --input-json cadence_policy=...
github.repo_starred_by: umbtest03 has starred runxhq/runx (verified via GitHub API)
Published skill resolves via registry read

dogfood.command: runx skill umbtest03/dunning-ladder@sha-7a9d3f3dcabe --registry https://api.runx.ai --json -i invoice_status=overdue -i aging_days=15 --input-json cadence_policy='...'

lineage.message: single receipt verification cannot prove receipt-tree lineage

findings.message: issuer public key hash does not match the resolved verifier key
